starry_unigraph.runtime.flare.training module

Flare DTDG training, evaluation, and prediction step functions.

Provides:

  • init_flare_training() — build model + optimizer + DDP wrapper and store them into the shared RuntimeBundle.

  • run_flare_train_step() — one forward + backward + optimizer step.

  • run_flare_eval_step() — one no-grad forward for validation.

  • run_flare_predict_step() — one no-grad forward for inference.

All step functions accept either STGraphBlob (training, multi-frame) or DTDGBatch (eval/predict, single-frame with stateful RNN state carried in runtime.state["eval_rnn_state"]).

starry_unigraph.runtime.flare.training.init_flare_training(runtime: RuntimeBundle, session_ctx: SessionContext, partition_data: Any, device: str | None = None) → None[source]

Initialize model, optimizer, and DDP for Flare DTDG training.

Builds a Flare model (via build_flare_model()), wraps it in DistributedDataParallel when distributed training is active, creates an Adam optimizer, computes a per-partition loss scale factor, and stores everything into the given runtime.

Args:

runtime: Shared RuntimeBundle to populate. session_ctx: Session context with config and distributed info. partition_data: PartitionData used to infer feature dims. device: Target device string (e.g. "cuda:0"). If None,

read from session_ctx.config["runtime"]["device"].

Side effects:

Sets runtime.model, runtime.optimizer, and runtime.state["flare_model"] / runtime.state["part_loss_scale"].

starry_unigraph.runtime.flare.training.run_flare_eval_step(runtime: RuntimeBundle, batch: Any, kernel_output: dict[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Execute one Flare evaluation step (no-grad forward).

For warmup batches (batch.chain == "snapshot_warmup"), only updates the persistent RNN state without computing loss. Returns {} for warmup batches so the session loop skips them.

Args:

runtime: RuntimeBundle with model. batch: A DTDGBatch with batch.graph. kernel_output: Extra metadata dict.

Returns:

Dict with "loss", "predictions", "targets", "meta", or empty dict {} for warmup batches.

starry_unigraph.runtime.flare.training.run_flare_predict_step(runtime: RuntimeBundle, batch: Any, kernel_output: dict[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Execute one Flare prediction step (no-grad forward, no loss).

Same warmup handling as run_flare_eval_step().

Args:

runtime: RuntimeBundle with model. batch: A DTDGBatch with batch.graph. kernel_output: Extra metadata dict.

Returns:

Dict with "predictions", "targets", "meta", or {} for warmup batches.

starry_unigraph.runtime.flare.training.run_flare_train_step(runtime: RuntimeBundle, batch: Any, kernel_output: dict[str, Any]) → dict[str, Any][source]

Execute one Flare training step (forward + backward + optimizer).

Args:

runtime: RuntimeBundle with model and optimizer. batch: An STGraphBlob (multi-frame training blob). kernel_output: Extra metadata dict (passed through to output).

Returns:

Dict with keys "loss" (float), "predictions" (list), "targets" (list or None), "meta" (dict).

Raises:

RuntimeError: If no labels are found in the batch.
